> 抓取来源：https://leria-info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ejinkao.hao/DQPSO.html

Xiangjing Lai, Jin-Kao Hao\*, Zhang-Hua Fu, Dong Yue. [Diversity-preserving quantum particle swarm optimization for the multidimensional knapsack problem](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2020.113310). Expert Systems with Applications, 2020 [https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2020.113310](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.eswa.2020.113310)

The code of the DQPSO\* algorithm is
available [here](https://leria-info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ejinkao.hao/DQPSO/DQPSOCode.zip)

The benchmark instances used in the paper are available from [http://people.brunel.ac.uk/~mastjjb/jeb/orlib/mknapinfo.html](http://people.brunel.ac.uk/%7Emastjjb/jeb/orlib/mknapinfo.html) and [here](http://www.info.univ-angers.fr/%7Ehao/DQPSO/DQPSOBenchmark.zip)

Note:

1) Please make sure that the above paper is cited if you use the code
in your research.

2) The software is distributed for academic purposes only. If you wish
to use this software for commercial applications, please contact the
authors.
